## What topic is missing?

<!-- Name the concept, entity, event, or practice you'd like to see covered. -->

## Why is it relevant to 21wiki?

<!-- One or two sentences on why it fits the scope — Bitcoin education grounded in 21ideas.org material. -->

## Do you know of a reputable source that covers this?

<!-- If yes, paste the URL. The wiki can only synthesize pages from existing 21ideas.org source material.
     If no source exists yet, a maintainer will check whether one is available. -->

- [ ] Yes: <!-- URL here -->

## Which language layer(s) is this missing from?

- [ ] English (`wiki-en/`)
- [ ] Russian (`wiki-ru/`)
- [ ] Both
